top_signals.title: SpaceX, OpenAI valuations could mean they leapfrog Berkshire Hathaway on first day of trading
top_signals.summary: Traders on prediction market Polymarket think SpaceX, OpenAI and Anthropic on their first day of trading will surpass valuations of at least $1.4 trillion.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
